summary: Feature Testing Complete: Per-scene action bar, Prep Mode Selection, and Adaptive tool display. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing confirmed all new features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/analyze/scene accepts prep_mode='audition'
Backend: POST /api/analyze/scene accepts prep_mode='booked'
Backend: POST /api/analyze/scene accepts prep_mode='silent'
Backend: POST /api/analyze/scene accepts prep_mode='study'
Backend: POST /api/analyze/scene works without prep_mode (backward compatible)
Backend: POST /api/analyze/scene accepts project_type='commercial'
Backend: POST /api/analyze/scene accepts project_type='tvfilm'
Backend: POST /api/analyze/scene accepts project_type='theatre'
Backend: POST /api/analyze/scene accepts project_type='voiceover'
Backend: POST /api/analyze/text (Quick mode) regression - works
Backend: POST /api/analyze/text (Deep mode) regression - works
Backend: POST /api/parse-scenes regression - works
Backend: POST /api/scripts/create regression - works
Backend: Full Script Quick mode E2E regression - works
Backend: Breakdown has memorization data for action bar
Frontend: Full Script Step 3 shows 'What's this for?' with 4 prep mode options
Frontend: Full Script Step 3 shows 'Project type' with 4 options
Frontend: Prep modes are toggleable (click to select, click again to deselect)
Frontend: ScriptOverview shows per-scene action bar with all buttons
Frontend: Action bar shows Run Lines, Memorize, Go Deeper, Share, PDF buttons
Frontend: Clicking Memorize opens Memorization Mode overlay
Frontend: Silent prep mode hides Run Lines and Memorize buttons
Frontend: Booked role prep mode shows Memorize BEFORE Run Lines
Frontend: Single scene 'Paste sides' flow still works (regression)
critical_code_review_comments: ScriptOverview.jsx lines 39-43: Adaptive tool visibility correctly implemented - showRunLines/showMemorize based on prepMode, memorizeFirst for booked role
ScriptOverview.jsx lines 138-227: Per-scene action bar correctly renders all buttons with proper data-testid attributes
UploadPage.jsx lines 639-666: 'What's this for?' prep mode selector with 4 options (audition, booked, silent, study) correctly implemented
UploadPage.jsx lines 669-691: Project type selector with 4 options (commercial, tvfilm, theatre, voiceover) correctly implemented
App.js lines 183-191: handleFullScriptAnalyze correctly passes prepMode and projectType to analyze/scene API calls
server.py lines 124-132: SingleSceneRequest model correctly includes optional prep_mode and project_type fields
server.py lines 1251-1258: analyze_single_scene correctly includes prep context in analysis_text
seed_data_creation: Test scripts created inline in test file for prep mode and project type testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three new features fully tested and working: 1) Per-scene action bar in ScriptOverview with Run Lines, Memorize, Go Deeper, Share, PDF buttons (data-testid='scene-action-bar'), 2) Prep Mode Selection in Full Script Step 3 with 4 options (audition, booked, silent, study) and Project Type with 4 options (commercial, tvfilm, theatre, voiceover), 3) Adaptive tool display - Silent mode hides Run Lines/Memorize, Booked mode shows Memorize before Run Lines. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_prep_mode_features.py covers all prep_mode and project_type combinations. Regression tests confirm single scene 'Paste sides' flow and Full Script Quick mode still work.

prep_mode_selection.toggle_behavior: Click to select, click again to deselect

adaptive_tool_display.silent_mode: Hides Run Lines and Memorize buttons
